title: BJP Leaders Chant Jai Sri Ram, But No Central Funds To Telangana: Konda Surekha
description: They only organise meetings and say 'Jai Shri Ram'. By saying 'Jai Shri Ram', are we getting any funds from the top (Centre) or schemes or something else? Nothing, " Konda Surekha said at a public meeting in Warangal on Tuesday.
